creator: culot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Ralf,

sorry it took me some time to start working on it but I am now trying to install piwigo using your patch and unfortunately there seems to have been an archive reroll upstream:

=> Attempting to fetch http://piwigo.org/download/dlcounter.php?code=2.7.4&/piwigo-2.7.4.zip
fetch: http://piwigo.org/download/dlcounter.php?code=2.7.4&/piwigo-2.7.4.zip: size mismatch: expected 7233462, actual 7233466


Would you by any chance know why the size of the archive changed since your submission? Any hint would be much appreciated!

Thanks,
Frederic
